question: Is the image shot from a slightly elevated angle?
Is the foreground a lush green soccer field with clearly visible white boundary lines, center circle, and penalty arc?
Are there exactly seven attacking players positioned on the half-field closer to the bottom of the frame?
Do the attacking players wear red jerseys, white shorts, and red socks?
Is the number '10' visible on the player raising his foot to shoot?
Is player number 10 raising his right foot in a shooting motion?
Is the soccer ball suspended mid-air showing distinct motion blur from spin?
Are there exactly eight defensive players positioned on the opposite (top) half of the field?
Do the defensive players wear blue jerseys and black shorts?
Is the goalkeeper wearing a fluorescent green jersey and diving to the right with arms spread wide?
Is the white mesh structure of the goal clearly visible?
Is there a head referee in a yellow shirt and black shorts running near the center circle?
Are there exactly two assistant referees standing along the sidelines holding red and yellow flags?
Is there a dark red rubberized running track with clear white lane markings encircling the field?
Does the running track clearly feature eight lanes?
Are distinct spectator details visible: waving red scarves, holding phones, and using sun umbrellas?
Are red triangular corner flags visible at the corners, appearing to flutter in the wind?
Is the stadium grandstand silver-gray with a curved steel structure and two tiers?
Does the banner text correctly read "Gotham City 16th Annual Spring Sports Festival"?
Are there exactly six colorful team flags hanging below the banner?
Are there exactly eight large silver floodlight poles rising from the top of the grandstand?
Are the crowns of tall poplar trees and the rooftops of exactly two cream-colored school buildings visible in the background?
Is the sky depicted as clear and light blue?
Are the main subjects (players, referees) complete without missing limbs or heads?
Is the image free from obvious distortions (e.g., extra fingers, twisted limbs) and artifacts?
